children.heading: .—Designation
children.label: a .—Designation
children.text: October is National Disability Employment Awareness Month.

children.heading: .—Ceremonies
children.label: b .—Ceremonies
children.text: Appropriate ceremonies shall be held throughout the United States during National Disability Employment Awareness Month to enlist public support for, and interest in, the employment of workers with disabilities who are otherwise qualified. Governors, mayors, heads of other governmental entities, and interested organizations and individuals are invited to participate in the ceremonies.

children.heading: .—Proclamation
children.label: c .—Proclamation
children.text: The President is requested to issue each year a suitable proclamation.
